title: docs not fully updated for new config file parsing
body:
In docs/source/markdown/podman.1.md  
CONFIGURATION FILES was not updated with all the new paths we use in addition, I guess instead of duplicating we should just link to the proper man pages.

docs/source/markdown/podman-image-trust.1.md.in
only refers to /etc/containers/policy.json but there are at least two other paths as well that can be used
